title: dactylorhiza incarnata var. ochroleuca
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata var. ochroleuca, also known as the yellow form of the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza incarnata var. ochroleuca include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
